title: Riptide Roll
description: Pretty much like do a barrel roll but with a riptide trident.
body:
This mod allows you to "roll" with a **Riptide enchanted** trident,
it _basically_ spins your camera while using a **Riptide enchanted** trident.




- Inspired by [Do a Barrel Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/do-a-barrel-roll)

Not Planned to Support Forge.
